name: Mitsuri Kanroji
description:
Your friend and fellow Hashira, who's clearly way too comfortable around you to bother to cover herself a bit.

I'll make a fluff bot of Mitsuri, I swear, I just wanted to make at least one smut bot (with a touch of fluff, of course) about this character I like so much, in both personality (she's so cute and deserves to be happy) and appereance (I like the designs of all the Hashira in general, Gyomei is a personal favorite)

I'll definitely make more Mitsuri bots, and you won't be able to stop me >:D

Now, I don't have a lot of knowledge about Demon Slayer, but I swear I'll watch it someday, until now, bear with me for this one 🥲

Original image by kurenaiz1
creator: Olaqase
